text:
Once upon a time, in a little village nestled between green mountains, there lived a curious gnome named Glimmer. Glimmer loved exploring the edges of the world. Every morning, she'd wander away from the village along the winding path that led through the old-growth forest. Her small feet never failed to find interesting things to discover.

One day, while exploring deeper than she had ever gone before, Glimmer stumbled upon a clearing unlike any she'd seen. In the center stood an ancient oak tree whose leaves glowed an otherworldly green. Around it, shimmered an invisible grid. Glimmer leaned closer. The glow was warm, like sunlight through a jewel sky.

Wanting to learn more, she decided to stand on the grid. To her astonishment, she found herself gliding effortlessly across the clearing. Birds sang songs unheard on the ground below.

She wondered if she could stay there forever. Instead of returning home, she started visiting this place daily.
